summary: Iteration 11: Tested Cash Book Auto-Linking from all modules (Salary, Advance, Byaj, Chit Fund). Fixed 2 bugs: (1) Advance API using wrong field name 'reason' instead of 'note', (2) Route conflict for /salary/payments/{month}. All 14 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend UI verified - Pay Salary modal shows Total Earned, Advance Deduction, Net Payable with Cash Book auto-link message.

bugs_fixed.issue: Advance API using 'advance.reason' but model has 'note' field
Route /salary/payments/{month} was after /salary/{staff_id}/{month} causing 'payments' to be matched as staff_id
Byaj add-to-cashbook mixing timezone-aware and naive datetimes
bugs_fixed.fix: Changed datetime.now(timezone.utc) to datetime.now() for consistency

passed_tests: POST /api/advances - Auto-creates Cash Book Debit entry with category 'salary'
POST /api/salary/pay - Auto-creates Cash Book Debit entry with advance deduction
POST /api/salary/pay with zero net - No Cash Book entry created
POST /api/interest-accounts/{id}/add-to-cashbook - Creates Cash Book Debit entry
POST /api/chit-funds/{id}/monthly-entry - Creates Cash Book Debit entry with category 'chit_fund'
GET /api/cashbook/{date} - Shows entries from all modules
Summary cards calculate correctly (Opening + Credit - Debit = Closing)
Entry with new party inline creation
All payment modes (cash, upi, bank_transfer) work

pay_salary_modal.cash_book_auto_link_message: Ye amount Cash Book me automatically Debit ho jayega with category 'Salary'.

critical_code_review_comments: All modules now auto-link to Cash Book as central ledger
Salary Payment creates Debit entry with advance deduction shown in description
Advance creates Debit entry with category 'salary'
Byaj creates Debit entry with category 'interest_paid'
Chit Fund EMI creates Debit entry with category 'chit_fund'
Pay Salary modal shows clear breakdown and Cash Book auto-link message in Hinglish
seed_data_creation: Test data created and cleaned up during pytest execution
context_for_next_testing_agent: Cash Book auto-linking fully tested. New test file: /app/backend/tests/test_cashbook_autolink.py covers all auto-link APIs. Key integrations: (1) Advance → Cash Book Debit, (2) Salary Pay → Cash Book Debit with advance deduction, (3) Byaj → Cash Book Debit, (4) Chit Fund EMI → Cash Book Debit. Pay Salary modal shows Total Earned, Advance Deduction, Net Payable with Hinglish message about Cash Book auto-link.

advance_auto_link.description: POST /api/advances auto-creates Cash Book Debit entry

salary_pay_auto_link.description: POST /api/salary/pay auto-creates Cash Book Debit entry with advance deduction

byaj_auto_link.description: POST /api/interest-accounts/{id}/add-to-cashbook creates Cash Book Debit entry

chit_fund_auto_link.description: POST /api/chit-funds/{id}/monthly-entry creates Cash Book Debit entry

unified_cashbook.description: Cash Book shows entries from all modules
